title: Semrush EyeOn turns competitor activity changes into a lightweight feed
claim: Semrush EyeOn watches competitor blog posts, ads, social posts, and new web pages, then summarizes those changes as a trackable feed.
source_snippet: EyeOn tracks competitor activity across posts, ads, pages, and social updates.
implication: ProductOS should add lightweight delta tracking and not force every competitor review to start from a blank slate.
followup_questions: What minimum delta model should ProductOS track before it attempts deeper synthesis?
